exampleSentencesTranslated: This afternoon I will go to the park to kick the ball with my friends.
He bought his son a new ball for his birthday.
She likes to watch ball games with her family on the weekend.
exampleSentences: Chiều nay em sẽ ra công viên đá bóng với bạn.
Anh mua cho con trai một quả bóng mới vào sinh nhật.
Chị thích xem bóng đá với gia đình vào cuối tuần.

example.en: The shadow of the tree is very big.
example.es: La sombra del árbol es muy grande.
example.vi: Cái bóng của cây rất lớn.

definitions.vi: Một cái bóng hoặc một quả bóng.

notes:
bóng = ball (the round thing you play with). It’s a countable noun, usually with the classifier quả → quả bóng.  

Very common in sports words: bóng đá (soccer/football), bóng rổ (basketball), bóng chuyền (volleyball).  

It can also mean shadow (cái bóng) — same spelling, different meaning, so pay attention to context.

translation.en: The children are playing with a ball.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần mua một cái ___ mới.

translation.en: We need to buy a new ball.

notes_md:
**bóng** = ball (the round thing you play with). It’s a **countable noun**, usually with the classifier **quả** → *quả bóng*.  

Very common in sports words: **bóng đá** (soccer/football), **bóng rổ** (basketball), **bóng chuyền** (volleyball).  

It can also mean **shadow** (cái bóng) — same spelling, different meaning, so pay attention to context.
